lines.text: Ah, a fresh soul wanders into my shop. What can I tempt you with today?
Everything has a price down here. Lucky for you, I accept more than just gold.
Death didn't stop you, did it? Good. The dead make the best customers.
Buy, sell, or be consumed. Those are your options, friend.
I've been dealing in the damned for centuries. Trust me, you want what I'm selling.
Even in Hell, supply and demand rules all. And demand is quite high lately.
Careful with that weapon. I'd hate to have to mop you off my floor.
Word travels fast down here. I heard you've been making quite a mess.
Don't let the fire and screaming put you off. It's quite cozy once you get used to it.
Come back soon. The darkness here gets lonely, even for me.
